title: Better Powder Snow
description: Helping you make out the powder snow by giving it a ice-ish look as everyone knows how annoying it is to walk and get frozen to death
body:
**Helping you make out the powder snow by giving it a ice-ish look as everyone knows how annoying it is to walk and get frozen to death**

This is made for player who like extra info for there surrounding and hopefully save someone from falling into this death trap
